# ToolResultContent.Content property

REQUIRED. The unstructured result content, using the content-block array form defined for tool results in §16; it MAY include text, images, audio, resource links, and embedded resources (spec §21.2.6).

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<ContentBlock> Content { get; set; }
```
